name: LLM Training Tracker
description: Live Prometheus metrics and log tail for active LLM training runs — demo mode with dummy data when unconfigured

settings.label: Prometheus URL
settings.description: e.g. http://localhost:9090 — leave blank for demo mode with dummy data

settings.label: Loki URL (optional)
settings.description: e.g. http://localhost:3100 — if set, fetches real log lines from Loki

settings.label: Prometheus Job Label
settings.description: The job= label selector on your training metrics

settings.label: Loss Metric Name
settings.description: Prometheus metric name for training loss

settings.label: Log Buffer Size
settings.description: Max number of log lines to retain in terminal view

settings.label: Chart History (minutes)
settings.description: How far back the loss chart shows data

settings.label: Idle Threshold (seconds)
settings.description: Mark job as idle if no new Prometheus samples for this many seconds
